steps.title: Read the degree clue
steps.content: The phrase more deep seclusion shows that deep describes the strength or degree of the seclusion. The cliffs make the scene feel even more secluded, not harder, uglier, or more complicated.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means difficult, which does not fit the quiet scene. Choice B adds ugliness, but the tone is contemplative. Choice C means complex, while the poem is describing the degree of isolation. The answer is D.
